scenarios.title: Verify Justdial logo visibility on homepage
steps: Navigate to the Justdial homepage URL.
Wait for the page to fully load.
Locate the Justdial logo element in the header section.
Check that the logo is visible and not hidden behind any overlays or banners.
Validate that the logo image is loaded correctly (no broken image icon).
Verify that the logo is displayed in the correct position as per the UI design.
scenarios.expected_result: Justdial logo is clearly visible, loaded correctly, and positioned as per design on the homepage.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Book a one-way domestic flight successfully (INR, GST applied)
steps: Navigate to Justdial flight booking section.
Search for a one-way flight from Mumbai (BOM) to Delhi (DEL) for a future date.
Validate search results are displayed with flight details, prices in INR (₹), and GST breakdown.
Apply filters: non-stop flights, early morning departure.
Sort results by lowest price.
Select a flight and proceed to the details page.
Validate flight, pricing (including GST), and cancellation policy per Indian norms.
Enter valid passenger and contact details.
Choose a payment method and complete the payment.
Validate booking confirmation page, PNR, and correct details in email/SMS.
validation: Search results match criteria.
Filters and sorting applied correctly.
Pricing breakdown includes GST as per Indian law.
Booking confirmation displays accurate, consistent data.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Successful KYC OCR Submission and Verification
steps: Navigate to the KYC submission page.
Upload a valid, clear image of an Aadhaar card (front and back).
Fill remaining mandatory fields (e.g., PAN number, mobile number).
Submit the KYC form.
Verify that the OCR engine accurately extracts all relevant details (name, DOB, address, Aadhaar number) and auto-fills them in the form fields.
Check GST field is auto-populated (if applicable) and GSTIN is validated.
Review extracted data for accuracy and make manual corrections if needed.
Click 'Confirm' to submit the KYC request.
Validate that a success message is displayed, and the user is redirected to the KYC status page.
Check that the KYC status is marked as 'Under Review' and the extracted data is visible in the user profile.
validation: OCR extraction matches uploaded document details.
GST field is correctly validated using Indian GST rules.
Success message and KYC status update.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Successful KYC OCR Verification with Valid Aadhaar Card Image
steps: Prepare a valid Aadhaar card image (front side, clear and unaltered).
Send a POST request to the /kyc/ocr/verify endpoint with the image as multipart/form-data.
Include required headers: Authorization (valid token), Content-Type (multipart/form-data), Accept (application/json), and API version.
Validate the response HTTP status code is 200.
Verify the response body contains extracted fields: name, DOB, gender, Aadhaar number, and address.
Check that the extracted data matches the details present in the submitted image.
Validate contract compliance: response schema matches API documentation.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: End-to-End Search for a Justdial Category via WhatsApp Chatbot
steps: Open WhatsApp on a mobile device and initiate a chat with the Justdial chatbot.
Send a search query for a broad category (e.g., 'Restaurants in Mumbai').
Wait for the chatbot to respond with a list of restaurant results.
Apply a price filter (e.g., 'Show restaurants under ₹500').
Sort the filtered results by rating (descending).
Select a restaurant to view its details page.
validation: Search results returned must be relevant to the category and location.
Applied price filter should exclude all restaurants above ₹500.
Sorting by rating should arrange entries in descending order.
Restaurant details page should display accurate and consistent information (address, contact, GST inclusive prices).
Back navigation returns to the filtered and sorted results without loss of context.
Session persists after navigating back and forth.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Verify Justdial logo is displayed on the main landing page
steps: Navigate to the main landing page of the application.
Wait for the page to fully load.
Locate the header section of the page.
Check for the presence of the Justdial logo in the header.
Validate that the logo is clearly visible and not distorted.
Confirm that the logo image source matches the expected Justdial branding asset.
validation: Justdial logo is present in the header section.
Logo is not broken, blurred, or pixelated.
Logo source URL matches the official asset location.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: End-to-End Lead Generation and Best Deal Acquisition Flow
steps: Navigate to the Justdial homepage.
Enter 'AC Repair' in the search bar and select location as 'Mumbai'.
Apply filters: price range ₹500-₹2000, rating 4 stars & above, and location 'Andheri'.
Sort the results by 'Best Deals' and verify the order changes accordingly.
Click on the first listing to view the details page.
Click 'Get Best Deal' and fill in lead details (name, mobile, email), then submit.
Verify that a confirmation message is shown and the lead is recorded in the backend.
Check that the best deal price includes GST (if applicable) and is in INR (₹).
Navigate back to the search results and ensure filters and sorting persist.
Log out and log in again, ensuring the session persists and recent activity is visible.
validation: Search results match filter and sorting criteria.
Deal price is in INR (₹) and GST is displayed if applicable.
Lead is captured and confirmation is shown.
Back navigation retains filters/sorting.
Session persistence is validated post re-login.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: End-to-End Sync and Discovery: JD–LG Google Listing via WhatsApp Engine
steps: Login as an authorized business user on JD platform.
Initiate Google Listing sync request for an LG product.
Confirm WhatsApp number association and opt-in for notifications.
Receive WhatsApp notification with Google listing details and a direct link.
Open the WhatsApp link; verify redirection to Google Listing details page.
Use search to find the LG product on Google Listing sync portal.
Apply filters: price (₹20,000–₹50,000), rating (4+), location (Delhi).
Sort filtered results by price (low to high).
Paginate to next page and verify listing continuity.
Click on a product to open its details page; validate product info, price (in ₹), GST details, and stock.
Navigate back to the results list; ensure filters and sorting persist.
Verify session persistence by reloading the page.
Test mobile responsiveness by resizing browser window.
Check that all listing data matches between JD, Google Listing, and WhatsApp notification.
validation: Google Listing sync occurs within SLA.
WhatsApp notification is received and contains correct product and link.
Search, filters, and sorting yield accurate and expected results.
Pagination works and does not duplicate/miss listings.
Product details (price in ₹, GST breakdown, cancellation policy) consistent across all platforms.
Filters/sorting remain after navigation.
Session persists after reload.
UI adjusts correctly for mobile screens.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Successful WhatsApp Message Sync for Google Listing Confirmation
steps: Login as a verified business admin on the JD platform.
Navigate to the LG Google Listing Sync Journey module.
Initiate a new Google Listing sync request for an eligible business.
System triggers WhatsApp communication to the registered business number.
Check that the WhatsApp message is delivered within 30 seconds.
Validate that the message content includes Google listing details, sync status, and a support contact.
Verify the message contains correct INR (₹) pricing information and GST breakdown if applicable.
Confirm that the business admin receives a success notification on the JD platform.
validation: WhatsApp message is received by the correct recipient.
Message content matches the latest Google listing sync data.
GST and total price in INR are displayed accurately.
JD platform shows a successful sync status.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: Sync Google Listing and Trigger WhatsApp Proactive Nudge
steps: Login as a verified business user with Google Listing integration enabled.
Navigate to the Google Listing Sync module within the dashboard.
Initiate a sync process for Google Listings.
Ensure the sync completes successfully and the listing data is updated.
Verify that a proactive WhatsApp nudge message is triggered to the business owner’s registered WhatsApp number.
Check that the WhatsApp message contains relevant Google Listing sync status details, timestamp, and a CTA to view details.
validation: Google Listing data is updated in the system.
WhatsApp message is delivered to the correct number within 2 minutes of sync.
Message content matches the expected template and includes sync status, timestamp, and CTA.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag is displayed for GST-verified products
steps: Navigate to the Product Details Page of a product that is GST-verified.
Wait for the page to fully load.
Locate the product information section.
Check for the presence of the 'GST Verified' tag near the product title or price.
Validate that the tag is visually distinct (e.g., with a unique color or icon).
Verify that the tag text reads exactly 'GST Verified'.
Confirm that the tag is not overlapping with other UI elements.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag is visible and correctly positioned for GST-verified products.
The tag uses the correct text and visual style as per design specifications.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag is not displayed for non-GST-verified products
steps: Navigate to the Product Details Page of a product that is NOT GST-verified.
Wait for the page to fully load.
Locate the product information section.
Check for the absence of the 'GST Verified' tag near the product title or price.
Ensure that no placeholder or empty space is left where the tag would normally appear.
Validate that the UI layout remains consistent and visually balanced.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag is NOT visible for non-GST-verified products.
The product details section displays correctly without any UI distortion or misalignment.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior for non-GST-verified products
scenarios.expected_result: System should not display the 'GST Verified' tag for products that are not GST-verified.

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag displays correctly with different product price points
steps: Navigate to the Product Details Page for a low-priced GST-verified product (e.g., ₹100).
Verify the presence and correct positioning of the 'GST Verified' tag.
Repeat for a mid-range GST-verified product (e.g., ₹5,000).
Repeat for a high-priced GST-verified product (e.g., ₹1,00,000).
Check that the tag does not overlap with the price or other UI elements for each price point.
Validate that the tag's appearance remains consistent across all price ranges.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag is consistently displayed for GST-verified products regardless of price.
The tag does not interfere with the display of the INR (₹) price or other UI elements.
scenarios.scenario: Validate tag display across various price points
scenarios.expected_result: System should display the 'GST Verified' tag correctly for all GST-verified products, regardless of price.

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag is accessible and screen reader compatible
steps: Navigate to the Product Details Page of a GST-verified product.
Enable a screen reader on the test device.
Use the screen reader to navigate to the product information section.
Check if the 'GST Verified' tag is announced with appropriate alt text or aria-label.
Verify that the tag is distinguishable for visually impaired users.
Ensure that the tag does not disrupt keyboard navigation flow.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag is accessible and properly announced by the screen reader.
Accessibility attributes (alt text, aria-label) are implemented as per guidelines.
scenarios.scenario: Validate accessibility of GST Verified Tag
scenarios.expected_result: System should provide accessible information about the 'GST Verified' tag for all users.

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag does not appear on partially loaded or failed product details page
steps: Simulate a slow network connection or interrupt the network during page load.
Navigate to the Product Details Page of a GST-verified product.
Observe the product information section as the page loads partially or fails to load completely.
Check if the 'GST Verified' tag appears before the product data is fully loaded.
Reload the page once the network is restored.
Verify that the tag only appears after the product data is successfully loaded.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag does NOT appear until the product information is fully loaded.
No placeholder or broken tag is displayed during partial load or failure.
scenarios.scenario: Validate tag behavior on incomplete or failed page loads
scenarios.expected_result: System should not display the 'GST Verified' tag until all required product data is loaded.

scenarios.title: GST Verified Tag is not displayed for products with missing GST verification status
steps: Navigate to the Product Details Page of a product with missing or null GST verification status in the backend.
Wait for the page to fully load.
Locate the product information section.
Check for the presence of the 'GST Verified' tag.
Verify that no tag is displayed if the GST verification status is unavailable.
Ensure the UI does not display any error or broken element in place of the tag.
validation: The 'GST Verified' tag is NOT displayed when GST verification status is missing.
The product details section remains visually consistent and error-free.
scenarios.scenario: Validate tag absence when GST status is missing
scenarios.expected_result: System should not display the 'GST Verified' tag for products with missing GST verification status.

scenarios.title: Book a Table via Chatbot for a Family Dinner
steps: Launch the restaurant chatbot interface.
Initiate a conversation with a request: 'I want to book a table for 5 people for dinner tonight.'
Provide requested details (date, time, contact number) as prompted by the chatbot.
Chatbot confirms availability and displays table options.
User selects preferred table and confirms booking.
Chatbot provides a booking summary including date, time, number of guests, and total estimated bill (including 5% GST).
validation: Verify chatbot correctly understands and responds to the booking request.
Check if available time slots and tables are shown accurately.
Ensure booking confirmation message is clear and contains all relevant details.
Validate that estimated bill includes GST and is displayed in INR (₹).
Confirm booking is reflected in backend reservation system.
scenarios.scenario: Validate system behavior
scenarios.expected_result: System should successfully complete: Validate system behavior

Search for listings where some businesses have GST verified status.

Hover over the GST Verified badge to verify tooltip or information popup appears with correct text (e.g., 'GST Verified').

validation: GST Verified badge is present only on GST-verified listings.
Badge layout matches UI/UX design.
Tooltip or popup displays correct information.
No badge is shown for non-verified listings.

Check for the presence of the 'GST Verified' badge/icon on applicable listings.

steps: Navigate to the NCT Results Page as a logged-in user.

scenarios.title: Verify chatbot provides accurate restaurant location details

Enter a query: 'What is the address of your Mumbai branch?'

Check if the chatbot responds with the full address, including street, area, city, and PIN code.

scenarios.title: Retrieve restaurant opening hours
steps: User initiates a chat with the AI chatbot.
User asks: 'What are your opening hours?'
Chatbot recognizes the intent as a request for business hours.
Chatbot fetches the current opening hours for the restaurant.
Chatbot responds with the detailed opening and closing times for each day of the week.

scenarios.scenario: Validate Persist and restore last session state on app relaunch
steps: Navigate to relevant page
Perform required action
Verify outcome
scenarios.expected_result: Persist and restore last session state on app relaunch is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Verify outcome; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Restore last searched query and result page on app relaunch (cold start)
steps: Launch the Justdial Android app (PS version).
Enter a search term (e.g., 'Plumbers in Mumbai') in the search bar and submit.
Wait for the result_page to load and verify listings are displayed.
Kill the app from recent apps (force close).
Relaunch the app.
Observe the landing page and search bar.
validation: App should open directly on the result_page with the last searched query pre-filled.
Listings should match the previous search context.
No login prompt or session loss unless user was logged out before.
scenarios.scenario: Restore last searched query and result page on app relaunch (cold start)
scenarios.expected_result: Restore last searched query and result page on app relaunch (cold start) is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Observe the landing page and search bar; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Restore last visited details_page after app relaunch (cold start)
steps: Launch the Justdial Android app.
Search for a business (e.g., 'Electricians in Delhi').
Tap on a listing to open its details_page.
Kill the app from recent apps.
Relaunch the app.
Observe the landing screen.
validation: App should restore to the same details_page as before exit.
Business information should be consistent with previous session.

scenarios.scenario: Restore last visited details_page after app relaunch (cold start)
scenarios.expected_result: Restore last visited details_page after app relaunch (cold start) is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Observe the landing screen; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Restore user_profile_page after app relaunch
steps: Launch the Justdial app and log in (if not already logged in).

Observe the landing screen.
validation: App should restore to the user_profile_page.

scenarios.expected_result: Restore user_profile_page after app relaunch is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Observe the landing screen; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Session state restoration after background/foreground transition (warm start)
steps: Launch the Justdial app and perform a search (e.g., 'Restaurants in Bangalore').
Open a business details_page.
Press the home button to send app to background.
Wait for 2 minutes.
Bring the app to foreground.
Observe the screen and data context.
validation: App should restore to the same details_page as before backgrounding.
All data should be intact and up-to-date.
No loss of session or navigation context.
scenarios.scenario: Session state restoration after background/foreground transition (warm start)
scenarios.expected_result: Session state restoration after background/foreground transition (warm start) is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Observe the screen and data context; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Offline relaunch restores cached last session state
steps: Launch the Justdial app and perform a search (e.g., 'Salons in Pune').
Open a listing's details_page.
Kill the app.
Disable device network (WiFi and mobile data).
Relaunch the app.
Observe the landing screen.
validation: App should restore to the last visited details_page using cached data.
A message should indicate offline mode if applicable.
No crash or blank screen should occur.
scenarios.scenario: Offline relaunch restores cached last session state
scenarios.expected_result: Offline relaunch restores cached last session state is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Observe the landing screen; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Recent search query persists and is suggested on relaunch

validation: The last searched query ('Hospitals in Chennai') appears in recent searches.

scenarios.title: Back-stack navigation consistency after session restoration

Open a business details_page.
Press back to return to result_page.

scenarios.expected_result: Back-stack navigation consistency after session restoration is completed successfully; final execution check confirms: Press back after relaunch; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Session state not restored after explicit logout and relaunch

scenarios.title: Corrupted session state does not crash app on relaunch

steps: Launch the Justdial app and perform a search.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section renders below city after B2B category search — standard phone — Chrome for Android
steps: Open the platform URL on a standard phone using Chrome for Android and perform a B2B category search; verify the results page loads with the city name at the top.
Scroll to the section immediately below the city name and verify the vehicle type section is present.
Check that the vehicle type section is fully visible, not truncated, and does not overlap with other elements.
Tap each vehicle type filter chip and verify the results are filtered accordingly.
Verify the tap targets for the vehicle type filter chips are at least 44x44px for easy selection.
Switch device orientation to landscape and verify the vehicle type section remains directly below the city name and does not overflow the viewport.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section displays correctly below city on compact phone — Samsung Internet
steps: Open the platform URL on a compact phone using Samsung Internet and perform a B2B category search; verify the results page loads with the city name at the top.
Scroll to the section below the city name and confirm that the vehicle type section is present and fully visible.
Verify that the vehicle type section does not wrap or overflow horizontally.
Tap each vehicle type filter and ensure results update as per the selected filter.
Check that the filter chips are horizontally scrollable if they exceed viewport width.
Verify no horizontal scroll appears for the overall page content.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section displays correctly below city on compact phone — Samsung Internet
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section displays correctly below city on compact phone — Samsung Internet is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Verify no horizontal scroll appears for the overall page content; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section updates instantly when different category is searched — B2B
steps: Open the platform URL and perform a B2B category search; verify the vehicle type section appears below the city name.
Enter a new category in the search bar and submit the search.
Confirm that the city name remains at the top and the vehicle type section updates to reflect the new category.
Tap a vehicle type filter and verify results update based on the selected type.
Check that the vehicle type section remains directly below the city name after the update.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section updates instantly when different category is searched — B2B
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section updates instantly when different category is searched — B2B is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Check that the vehicle type section remains directly below the city name after the update; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section is rendered correctly in @Lang Regional Script
steps: Open the platform URL and perform a B2B category search where the city name and vehicle type labels are displayed in a regional language script.
Verify that all regional language text in the vehicle type section is rendered correctly with no encoding or garbled characters.
Tap a vehicle type filter and ensure the filtered results and labels remain in the regional script.
Check that the vehicle type section remains correctly positioned below the city name.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section is rendered correctly in @Lang Regional Script
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section is rendered correctly in @Lang Regional Script is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Check that the vehicle type section remains correctly positioned below the city name; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Bilingual content without overlap
steps: Open the platform URL and perform a B2B category search with mixed English and regional language labels for city and vehicle type.
Verify that both English and regional language text are displayed in the vehicle type section without overlap or truncation.
Tap a bilingual vehicle type filter and confirm the results reflect the selected filter, preserving both languages.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Bilingual content without overlap
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Bilingual content without overlap is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Tap a bilingual vehicle type filter and confirm the results reflect the selected filter, preserving both languages; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Mixed Script in vehicle type labels
steps: Open the platform URL and perform a B2B category search where vehicle type labels contain both English and regional script in the same string.
Verify that the mixed script labels are rendered without layout breakage or symbol substitution.
Tap a mixed script vehicle type filter and confirm results update and the label remains correctly displayed.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Mixed Script in vehicle type labels
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section supports @Lang Mixed Script in vehicle type labels is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Tap a mixed script vehicle type filter and confirm results update and the label remains correctly displayed; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section handles @Lang Input Search in regional language
steps: Open the platform URL and enter a B2B category search term in a regional script.
Confirm that autosuggest displays relevant categories in the same script.
Select a suggestion and verify the results page loads with the vehicle type section below the city name, all displayed in the regional script.
Tap a vehicle type filter and confirm results update and labels remain in the regional script.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section handles @Lang Input Search in regional language
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section handles @Lang Input Search in regional language is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Tap a vehicle type filter and confirm results update and labels remain in the regional script; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section maintains correct position and layout on large phone — Safari for iOS
steps: Open the platform URL on a large phone using Safari for iOS and perform a B2B category search.
Scroll to the section below the city name and verify the vehicle type section is present and fully rendered.
Switch between portrait and landscape orientations and confirm the vehicle type section remains directly below the city name with no overflow or truncation.
Tap each vehicle type filter and verify results update as expected.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section maintains correct position and layout on large phone — Safari for iOS
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section maintains correct position and layout on large phone — Safari for iOS is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Tap each vehicle type filter and verify results update as expected; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section filters results and preserves scroll position after navigation
steps: Open the platform URL and perform a B2B category search.
Tap a vehicle type filter and verify the results update accordingly.
Tap on a result to open its details page.
Use the browser back button to return to the results page and verify the scroll position and selected vehicle type filter are preserved.
Confirm that the vehicle type section is still correctly positioned below the city name.
scenarios.scenario: Vehicle type section filters results and preserves scroll position after navigation
scenarios.expected_result: Vehicle type section filters results and preserves scroll position after navigation is completed successfully; validation evidence captured in step: Confirm that the vehicle type section is still correctly positioned below the city name; success state is visible to user and data remains consistent after refresh.

scenarios.title: Vehicle type section overlaps with city name on compact phone — layout breakage
steps: Open the platform URL on a compact phone and perform a B2B category search.
Resize or zoom the page to the minimum supported viewport.
Verify that the vehicle type section does not overlap with or obscure the city name. If overlap occurs, flag as a layout issue.

steps: Open the platform URL on a compact phone and perform a B2B category search.

Verify that any chip with a tap target smaller than 44x44px is flagged as a usability issue.
